arts.ttl: Freiburg vs Augsburg preview: Hosts to become surprise table-toppers?
arts.sum: Freiburg have the chance to climb to the top of the Bundesliga table by the end of matchweek seven when they host 13th-placed Augsburg at the Europa-Park-Stadion on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Preview: Freiburg vs. Augsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Bundesliga clash between Freiburg and Augsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
